description_long: This object is a classic Sega Mega Drive (Genesis) video game console, featuring a rectangular black plastic body with rounded edges and a prominent circular cartridge slot in the center. The cartridge slot is currently occupied by a game cartridge displaying an image of Sonic the Hedgehog. The front panel includes a sliding power switch, a reset button, and a headphone jack, while the right side features a series of vent-like grooves for cooling. The surface is glossy and reflective, with the '16-BIT' and 'MEGA DRIVE SEGA' logos clearly visible in white and gold lettering. The overall design is compact and low-profile, with most controls and branding concentrated on the front and top surfaces.
description: A glossy black Sega Mega Drive console with a central cartridge slot, visible Sonic game cartridge, and front-facing controls and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular cartridge slot and the inserted game cartridge, with the power switch and reset button partially visible.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the vent grooves, cartridge slot, and the side profile of the inserted cartridge.
description_view_2: Direct top-down view displaying the full cartridge slot, Sonic cartridge artwork, and clear 'MEGA DRIVE SEGA' branding.
description_view_3: Right angled view focusing on the cartridge slot, the side of the cartridge, and the smooth, rounded edge of the console.
